General.Name: Leading Holdings Group Ltd
General.Description: Leading Holdings Group Limited develops and sells residential and commercial properties in Mainland China. It operates in three segments: Property Development, Commercial Property Investment and Operation, and Hotel Operations. The company also holds various commercial properties for further investment purposes; and provides project management services. In addition, it engages in property leasing; and hotel operation and management services. The company was formerly known as Leading China Holdings Limited. Leading Holdings Group Limited was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Chengdu, China.
General.Address: Tower A, Leading International Finance Center, Chengdu, China

AddressData.Street: Tower A, Leading International Finance Center
